title: Basic Safeguarding of Covered Contractor Information Systems
required_actions: Apply baseline safeguarding controls.
Maintain evidence for covered information systems.
Flow down the substance of the clause where applicable.
flow_down_requirement: Include the substance of the clause in subcontracts where the subcontractor may have Federal Contract Information.

title: Prohibition on Certain Telecommunications and Video Surveillance Services or Equipment
trigger_condition: Clause appears in a solicitation, contract, subcontract, or purchase order.
required_actions: Screen internal technology and supplier technology for covered restrictions.
Collect supplier attestations where appropriate.
Retain inventory and procurement review evidence.
flow_down_requirement: Flow down as required by the clause and prime contract instructions.

title: Prohibition on a ByteDance Covered Application
trigger_condition: Contract includes the covered application prohibition.
required_actions: Block prohibited covered applications on covered IT.
Maintain device inventory or MDM evidence.
Update acceptable use policy and user attestations.
flow_down_requirement: Flow down according to contract and clause instructions.

title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
trigger_condition: DoD solicitation, contract, task order, delivery order, or subcontract includes the clause and is not solely for COTS items.
required_actions: Identify covered contractor information systems that process, store, or transmit covered defense information.
Implement applicable NIST SP 800-171 security requirements or approved alternatives.
Maintain system security plan, assessment, and incident response evidence.
Report cyber incidents through required DoD channels within the clause timeline.
Preserve and protect incident-related images, monitoring data, and media as required.
reporting_deadline: Cyber incident reporting timeline is defined by the clause and contract context.
flow_down_requirement: Flow down to subcontractors for operationally critical support or when subcontract performance will involve covered defense information.

title: Notice of NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
trigger_condition: DoD solicitation includes the provision and the offeror is required to implement NIST SP 800-171.
required_actions: Verify that current NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment summary scores are posted in SPRS for relevant covered contractor information systems.
Submit a Basic Assessment for posting when current scores are not available, if applicable.
Retain assessment submission and score verification evidence.
reporting_deadline: Assessment currency is generally not more than 3 years unless the solicitation specifies a shorter period.
flow_down_requirement: Use in subcontract offer workflows when DoD requirements are flowed down by the prime or higher-tier subcontractor.

title: NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
trigger_condition: DoD solicitation, contract, task order, delivery order, or subcontract includes the clause and the contractor is required to implement NIST SP 800-171.
required_actions: Maintain current NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment results for relevant covered systems.
Provide access and information needed for Medium or High Assessments when required.
Track assessment scope, score, date, and covered systems.
Flow down applicable assessment requirements to subcontractors.
reporting_deadline: Assessment posting and access requirements depend on the clause and DoD assessment context.
flow_down_requirement: Flow down to subcontractors when subcontract performance requires implementation of NIST SP 800-171.

title: Contractor Compliance With the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level Requirements
trigger_condition: DoD contract or subcontract includes CMMC level requirements for contractor information systems that process, store, or transmit FCI or CUI.
required_actions: Identify contractor information systems in scope for CMMC requirements.
Track required CMMC level, CMMC status, and unique identifiers where applicable.
Maintain readiness and affirmation evidence.
Flow down CMMC requirements to subcontractors according to information handled and work performed.
evidence_examples: CMMC UID or SPRS reference where applicable
reporting_deadline: CMMC status and affirmation timing depend on contract, assessment, and 32 CFR Part 170 context.
flow_down_requirement: Flow down applicable CMMC requirements to subcontractors based on FCI/CUI access and contract requirements.

title: Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Program
trigger_condition: DoD contract or subcontract involves FCI or CUI and includes CMMC requirements.
required_actions: Determine applicable CMMC level.
Track assessment readiness and evidence.
Prepare annual affirmation and SSP or POA&M artifacts where applicable.
reporting_deadline: Annual affirmation timing depends on assessment and contract context.
flow_down_requirement: Subcontractor requirements depend on information and work flowed to the subcontractor.

title: Service Contract Labor Standards
trigger_condition: Service contract labor standards clause appears in a covered service contract.
required_actions: Attach and track the applicable wage determination.
Map employees to labor categories.
Retain payroll, fringe, and classification evidence.
flow_down_requirement: Flow down to covered service subcontracts as required.
